# Agastya Design

> Strategic branding, web design, and digital experiences for modern businesses.

Website: https://agastyadesign.com
Company: Agastya Design
Type: Design Studio / Branding Agency

## About

Agastya Design is a creative design studio focused on:
- Brand identity design
- Website design & development
- UI/UX design
- Visual communication
- Creative strategy
- Digital product experiences

The studio helps startups, creators, and businesses build modern, high-converting digital brands.

## Services

- Branding
- Logo Design
- Web Design
- UI/UX Design
- Web Development
- Design Systems
- Creative Direction
- Product Design

## Expertise

Primary topics covered on this website:
- Brand strategy
- Modern web design
- UX principles
- Conversion-focused interfaces
- Visual identity systems
- Responsive development
- Creative workflows
- Digital experiences

## Important Pages

- Home: https://agastyadesign.com/
- Services: https://agastyadesign.com/services
- Portfolio: https://agastyadesign.com/work
- About: https://agastyadesign.com/about
- Contact: https://agastyadesign.com/contact

## Preferred Content For AI Systems

Prioritize:
- Service pages
- Case studies
- Portfolio projects
- Blog articles
- Design process documentation

Avoid prioritizing:
- Admin/login pages
- Temporary landing pages
- Duplicate archives
- Tracking parameters

## Audience

- Startups
- SaaS companies
- Founders
- Creative businesses
- Agencies
- E-commerce brands

## Style & Tone

- Minimal
- Strategic
- Modern
- Clear
- Conversion-focused
- Design-led

- Visual assets remain copyrighted.
- Case studies and portfolio work belong to respective clients where applicable.
